stories.headline: Dua Lipa shares new photos of second wedding with husband Callum Turner - USA Today
stories.summary: The pop star and actor tied the knot at an intimate civil wedding in London before having a second, more picturesque wedding on a Sicilian island.

stories.headline: Jamie Lynn Spears Revealed The Real Reason Why She Left Hollywood, And It's Actually Really Sad - BuzzFeed
Crippling impact of Paramount-Warner deal on Los Angeles workforce revealed - New York Post
stories.summary: The combined studios face an “unusually high” $82 billion debt, eyeing $6 billion in savings by cutting duplicative roles.

stories.headline: 'Will & Grace,' 'Friends' stars pay tribute to James Burrows after legendary TV director dies at 85 - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
Daveigh Chase's mother says late The Ring star struggled with addiction after back injury: 'She was completely gone' - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: Daveigh Chase's mother said that 'drugs took hold of' the late 'Lilo & Stitch' actress after she was prescribed painkillers for a back injury she sustained in a motorcycle accident around 2016.

stories.headline: ‘Toy Story 5’ Headed to $160M for Biggest Opening of 2026 - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: Steven Spielberg's 'Disclosure Day' is falling 69 percent, while sensation 'Obsession' will finally post a weekend smaller than its opening.

stories.headline: George Lucas Lends Voice To ‘Minions & Monsters’ - Deadline
stories.summary: Star Wars creator George Lucas is coming out of retirement for a role in Illumination's Minions & Monsters, arriving in theaters July 1.

stories.headline: Taylor Swift extends olive branch to Blake Lively with surprise wedding invite: report - Page Six
stories.summary: The former pals fell out as friends after Lively involved the singer in her “It Ends With Us” legal drama.
